product: Postgres password authentication is now disabled by default for new Lakebase…
tagline: New Lakebase Autoscaling projects now have native Postgres password authentication disabled by default.
what_it_does: New Lakebase Autoscaling projects now have native Postgres password authentication disabled by default. Existing Autoscaling projects are unaffected. To allow native Postgres roles to connect with static passwords, enable password connections in project settings.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: New Lakebase Autoscaling projects now have native Postgres password authentication disabled by default. Existing Autoscaling projects are unaffected.
key_takeaway: New Lakebase Autoscaling projects now have native Postgres password authentication disabled by default.
